recentArticles.title: Jackson legacy on the line as ‘Michael’ biopic divides the family once more - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackson legacy on the line as ‘Michael’ biopic divides the family once more. “In what should be a great time for this family, a time when everyone really gets a chance to not only rally around [ailing family matriarch] Katherine and the memory of Michael, but to celebrate Jaafar, there is still division,” a family source told The Post. On one side, three of the Jackson 5 family band which launched Michael’s career: Jermaine, 71, Jackie, 74, and Marlon, 69, who all returned to Gary, their hometown, this week joined by their children and a packed crowd for the premiere. On the other side stand Randy and Janet Jackson, Michael’s closest siblings in age. Long considered the outlier in the family, Randy’s strained relations are partly rooted in one of the most personal betrayals in Jackson family history — when Jermaine married Alejandra Oaziaza, the mother of two of Randy’s children, Steven and Genevieve, in 1995. “There’s never been a doubt that the Jackson cousins have been closer than the Jackson siblings,” a source said.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於麥可傑克森傳記電影上映後，傑克森家族內部因電影和過往恩怨再次產生分歧。

Like, this song is so toxic.” And other people are like, “Oh, girl, it’s a sex song. Like, she just wanted to get cracked.” And then there’s other songs that’s like, “OK, so they had you messed up and you’re just gonna take them back and you just folded the clothes like that?” I’m like, “Oh, wow, let’s talk about it some more.”. We made one song, and I was like, “It is not time for this weird-ass album. Like, it’s not time for this right now. Like, if there was ever a time, it’s right now. I just came out of it and went on kind of this redemption tour of, like, “Let me see who really is still here with me through all the chaos.” And I was like, “OK.

recentArticles.title: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? - Celtics Wire
recentArticles.snippet: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? # Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? Jaylen Brown has made a name for himself in NBA media circles for his thoughtful, and at times, unguarded answers about a variety of topics both on and off the court since joining the league in 2016. Brown was honored with a nod for the organization of journalists covering the sport for their First Team All-Interview. According to the PBWA, the designation, "which honors the players who are consistently thoughtful, insightful and engaging with the media," saw the Cal alum come in fifth overall in votes among those participating in the voting. San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama and Golden State Warriors legend Stephen Curry were the top two vote-getters, along with the rest of the First Team, Kevin Durant of the Houston Rockets, Donovan Mitchell of the Cleveland Cavaliers, and Brown.

recentArticles.title: Boys Volleyball Dominates Burlingame in Short Game - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: Senior defensive specialist Jaden Clark took the service line and delivered a series of clean serves that forced the Panthers into an early timeout with the Bears leading 3-0. Adding on, junior setter Coen Chou wasted no time finding momentum, setting up senior outside hitter Ben Warner\* for a sharp hit on the line to extend the lead to 5-0. Sandoval continued to anchor the back row, while a series of blocks at the net by Cunningham and Warner forced the Panthers into faults, extending the lead to 19-9. Chou set up Warner for another shocker of a hit to reach 13-7, where Warner remained a force at the net, nailing a hit into the side of the court to further extend the lead to 15-8. Robbins fired a hit into a gap in the Panthers’ defense to reach match point, and a final block by Chou and Cunningham ended the set 25-11, concluding a three-set victory for M-A.

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber Coachella Debate Rages Over One Question: Was His Set Perfectly Minimal or Not Enough? - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: One of those people was *Billboard*‘s own Lyndsey Havens, who, in her recap of the performance, praised Bieber for managing “to make a polo field of strangers feel like a late-night hang among close friends.” While some concertgoers and YouTube stream watchers similarly praised the set’s minimalist aesthetic — a lo-fi feel that definitely matched Bieber’s pair of 2025 albums *SWAG* and *SWAG II* — others compared the performance to JB’s fellow 2026 headliner Sabrina Carpenter or even Beyoncé’s famous 2018 Beychella set and wondered how he got away with doing so little on the biggest festival stage in the U.S. On the new *Billboard Pop Shop Podcast*, Katie & Keith are discussing the active debate — as well as the sea of special guests (Jennifer Lopez! Casual pop fans and chart junkies can hear*Billboard*‘s executive digital director, West Coast, Katie Atkinson and*Billboard*’s managing director, charts and data operations, Keith Caulfield every week on the podcast, which can be streamed on Billboard.com or**downloaded in Apple**Podcasts or your favorite podcast provider.

recentArticles.title: Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer. The 10-time Grammy-, two-time Oscar-winning singer dropped a new trailer for her upcoming concert film *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* on Monday (April 13). The new three-minute-long trailer follows Eilish and three-time Oscar winner James Cameron as Eilish gets ready to perform for thousands of fans and Cameron prepares to capture the moment. On top of getting a look at how Cameron and Eilish filmed the singer’s concert, fans also get behind-the-scenes looks at how Eilish gets ready for a sold-out performance in the trailer. Her songs, including the Billboard Hot 100 No. 1 hit “Bad Guy” and “Chihiro,” are played over moments of Eilish on- and offstage as the words “Prepare for her vision / her words / her world” flash on the screen. *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D),* co-directed by Cameron and Eilish, hits theaters on May 8.
recentArticles.summary: Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Kehlani On 'Folded,' Staying True To Her Moral Compass and More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Around the same time, Kehlani dropped “Folded,” the throwback slow jam that slowly grew into the biggest hit of her career, reaching No. 6 on the Billboard Hot 100 (her first top 10 on the chart) and eventually winning Grammys for best R&B song and best R&B performance. “You could think this is the furthest I’m ever going to go and this is the biggest it’s ever going to get,” says this year’s Women in Music Impact honoree, “and then God just surprises you and says, ‘No, I thought bigger for you always.’ ”. I really want some of these songs to make it into movies … and ultimately just have a really historical personal moment for me, and hopefully keep adding to the genre because that’s the coolest thing that “Folded” has done beyond anything — I’m watching the conversation change and I’m a part of it.

Coming of age in Las Vegas, he had “never seen a hotel without cigarettes.” His mother smoked inside the family’s apartment and on his latest album, “Casino,” the 25-year-old rapper and producer who goes by Baby Keem likens it to living in a haunted house. Keem first emerged as a teenager in 2019 with the piquant self-produced hit “Orange Soda,” and has been a rising star, if a hazy one. “There’s curiosity to my story,” Keem said.

recentArticles.title: Dave Chappelle stands firm through backlash and considers revisiting ‘Chappelle’s Show’ - Greenwich Time
recentArticles.snippet: “I’ve had a lot of support from my people,” said Chappelle, an Emmy and Grammy winner. “Sometimes people will attach things to your voice that don’t necessarily have anything to do with you,” he said. Even as he reflects on his own career, Chappelle said he’s paying close attention to the next generation of comedians. “I love what he does,” Chappelle said before drawing a distinction between digital success and stand-up. “One of the worst things that can happen to a comedian is becoming successful before they get good,” Chappelle said. Chappelle remains active onstage, including upcoming performances tied to the Netflix Is a Joke Fest in Los Angeles in May. Back home, he continues to perform at his own comedy club — which used to be a firehouse — in Yellow Springs, where he has hosted surprise sets and brought in high-profile guests, including Travis Scott, Lizzo, Wyclef Jean, Marsha Ambrosius, Clipse, 50 Cent and Christopher Cross.

recentArticles.title: Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed - WXXI News
recentArticles.snippet: # Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed. When Jay was 22 years old, he was a self-described loner. And so I started making poor decisions," Jay said. "The next night I made a plan of how to do it, and I did it," Jay remembered. Jay made a plan to end his life. Jay had grown up religious, but had stopped going to church years before. He said yes, and listened as the man began to pray. "I wish I could tell you that I remember the [exact] words that he said to me, but what I remember is that his words landed with me, and instead of wanting my life to be over, suddenly I saw hope," Jay said. The interaction happened nearly ten years ago, but it was a pivotal moment in Jay's life, and one he thinks about all the time. Jay says that he wishes he could meet that man again and express his appreciation.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導中的「Jay」並非指華語歌手周杰倫，而是講述一位同名男子在獄中經歷絕望後重獲希望的故事。

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber Goes Heavy On ‘Swag’ In Much-Anticipated Coachella Headlining Set - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Bieber Goes Heavy On ‘Swag’ In Much-Anticipated Coachella Headlining Set. Bieber brought out The Kid Laroi to perform their smash hit stay, with other guests including Wizkid, Tems, Dijon and Mk.gee. Justin Bieber played his biggest concert in years as he headlined Coachella on Saturday night, delivering an intimate concert that leaned heavy on his *Swag* era and had Bieber mining through old YouTube clips on his laptop to take fans back to the early days. Kicking off at about 11:30 p.m., Bieber spent much of the first chunk of his set focused around his *Swag* era, opening with “All I Can Take” before going into “Speed Demon,” “First Place,” and “Go Baby.” He stuck with *Swag* songs until he brought out his first surprise guest of the evening, with The Kid Laroi coming out to perform their 2021 smash hit “Stay.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於小賈斯汀在Coachella音樂節的演出，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Oasis Wins Major Tour of the Year Honor at 2026 Pollstar Awards - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Oasis’ Comeback Outing Wins ‘Major Tour of the Year’ Prize at Pollstar Awards, as Kendrick Lamar/SZA, Benson Boone and the Weeknd Also Score Top Honors. Other top winners in genre-based categories included Metallica (for rock tour of the year), Kendrick Lamar/SZA (hip-hop tour of the year), the Weeknd (R&B tour of the year), Benson Boone (pop tour of the year), Bad Bunny (Latin tour of the year), Adam Sandler (comedy tour of the year), and Chris Stapleton and Lainey Wilson (who tied for country tour of the year). Among the awards going to individuals were the award for promoter of the year, which went to Live Nation’s Arthur Fogel, a bit of good news amid a tough day for that company, plus Barclay Center’s Laurie Jacoby as venue executive of the year, Red Light’s Coran Capshaw as personal manager of the year, Shore Fire’s Rebecca Shapiro as publicist of the year, CAA’s Allison McGregor as marketing executive of the year, and another CAA honoree, Darryl Eaton, as agent of the year.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了2026年Pollstar Awards的各項巡演獎項得主，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jerry Seinfeld, Weird Al Yankovic to Headline Just For Laughs 2026 - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: Jerry Seinfeld and Weird Al Yankovic are returning to their comedy roots as headliners for the *Just For Laughs* comedy festival in Montreal in July, organizers said Wednesday. After directing his first movie, *Unfrosted,* for Netflix, Seinfeld will return to Montreal for its 2026 edition to perform his solo show, *Jerry Seinfeld Live*, on July 23 in the Place des Arts concert hall. ### Netflix Is a Joke Festival Sets 2026 Lineup: See Who Is Performing in Los Angeles in May](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/netflix-is-a-joke-festival-2026-lineup-schedule-los-angeles-1236478031/). And Yankovic, who first played at JFL in Montreal in 1990, will perform his own solo show, *Weird Al Yankovic: Bigger and Weirder Tour,* for free on July 25 in the outdoor Place des Festivals venue. JFL organizers also announced their first wave of hosts for twice-nightly galas, including YouTube star Gabriel “Fluffy” Iglesias, *Trainwreck* actor Mike Birbiglia, Atsuko Okatsuka, whose second TV stand-up special streamed on Hulu and Disney+, and Gerry Dee, the *Animal Control* star.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Jerry Seinfeld和Weird Al Yankovic將擔任2026年Just For Laughs喜劇節的頭條表演者，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: 6LACK Shares New Single ‘Sunday Again’ Featuring 2 Chainz - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # 6LACK Shares New Single ‘Sunday Again’ Featuring 2 Chainz. 6LACK is back with new music. The Atlanta singer-rapper released “Sunday Again” featuring 2 Chainz on Friday, alongside a companion music video directed by Levi Turner, as the latest preview of his forthcoming album *Love Is the New Gangsta*, due May 22 via LVRN/Interscope Records. The video — which also features cameos from artists Mereba, umi, Quin and slimwav — sees 6LACK and 2 Chainz surrounded by friends and family in what the artist describes as a moment of community and serenity, reflecting the album’s central theme of universal love. The new album follows 6LACK’s 2023 effort *Since I Have a Lover*, which earned a Grammy nomination for Best Progressive R&B Album and received widespread critical praise from outlets including NPR, Pitchfork, Rolling Stone and Complex. His 2018 follow-up *East Atlanta Love Letter* peaked at No. 3 on the Billboard 200 and hit No. 1 on the Top R&B Albums chart.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於歌手6LACK發布新單曲《Sunday Again》並預告即將推出的專輯，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Hailey Bieber Shares Video of Baby Jack Dancing to Justin Bieber at Coachella - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Hailey Bieber Shares Video of Baby Jack Dancing to Justin Bieber at Coachella. On Monday, Hailey Bieber shared behind-the-scenes footage from the Bieber family takeover of Coachella, including 19-month-old Jack Blues Bieber. The first photo shows Hailey standing alongside Justin, who is holding baby Jack. Last Halloween, Hailey shared a photo of Jack wearing the famed purple hoodie and white jacket Justin wore fifteen years ago during his My World Tour. On April 5, Hailey posted an Instagram carousel showing Jack playing with her newly launched Rhode pimple stickers and Justin holding Jack on his lap while watching his 2011 "Never Say Never" documentary. On Jake Shane's "Therapuss" Season 3 premiere, Hailey Bieber revealed that Jack started saying, "Baby, oh, Baby, oh" because he had been listening to his dad's seminal hit "Baby." She added, "He honestly looks identical" to Justin and had recently gotten his hair buzzed to "look like dada.".

I think I felt a lot of that while making music during that time and ever since. Because there are so many emotions in life, right?… Whether it’s joy, or love, or even something more negative, nowadays I’m more interested in facing those emotions head-on and expressing them through my music. **I think it’s clear from your lyrics and interviews that sometimes J-Hope is looking for a source of hope. I’m always reminding myself, “You are J-Hope.”  So, no, I don’t have a detailed method for how to get there, but my current life is so intertwined with the concept of hope, and J-Hope, so I happened to find my way.

A home filled with cracked porcelain, a creaky piano, a sinister voice growling, “What the \*fuck\* are you doing here?” Lucy Liyou has compared her new album to a “horror house,” and the avant-garde sound artist has clearly done her homework. The Japanese American rapper and digicore producer’s new LP, *Backstage Hologram*, gets playful with polyphony and bit music-inflected suites, as on the dextrous blip-and-vocal orchestra conjured on the “Noir Kei.” Kuru may be expanding their roster of influences, but their roots remain close at hand: The features here include Xaviersobased, Katmoji, and Kuru’s tourmate Lucy Bedroque. recentArticles.title: Zayn Kicks Back With ‘Konnakol’: Stream It Now - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Zayn Kicks Back With ‘Konnakol’: Stream It Now. The former One Direction singer will support the new release with several major TV appearances, and his biggest solo tour yet. The British pop singer is back with his fifth studio album, *Konnakol* (via Mercury Records/Island Records U.K.), a collection that houses the previously-released recording “Sideways” and lead single “Die For Me.”. *Konnakol* is Zayn’s first since 2024’s *Room Under the Stairs*, which peaked at No. 15 on the Billboard 200, and No. 3 on the U.K.’s Official Albums Chart. Zayn co-produced the new LP with Malay (Frank Ocean, Lorde), extending a working relationship that dates back to his debut solo album *Mind of Mine* (2016) and its followup *Icarus Falls* (2018). He made the best possible start with his first single “Pillowtalk,” which led the Billboard Hot 100 and the Official U.K. Singles Chart.

recentArticles.snippet: # Johnny Knoxville Reveals Wild ‘Jackass: Best and Last’ Trailer. Johnny Knoxville collided with CinemaCon to reveal the first look at *Jackass: Best and Last*. The film continues the hijinks for the franchise that last hit the big screen with 2022’s *Jackass Forever*. Knoxville took the stage and said he felt emotional, knowing that the film is purportedly the final one in the series: “*Jackass* means a hell of a lot to me and our cast and crew that has been together for over 25 years.”. ### James Cameron Promises Billie Eilish Doc "Is Not a Concert Movie for Streaming"](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/billie-eilish-james-cameron-hit-me-hard-and-soft-doc-1236565309/). ### 'Top Gun 3' "Script Underway" to Reunite Tom Cruise and Jerry Bruckheimer](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/top-gun-3-script-underway-tom-cruise-1236566290/). *Jackass: Best and Last* is the fifth main feature installment for the film series that kicked off with 2002’s *Jackass: The Movie*. The franchise began with the MTV series *Jackass* that counted Knoxville, Jeff Tremaine and Spike Jonze as producers.

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber’s Skylrk Breaks Coachella Merch Sales Records - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Bieber’s Skylrk Breaks Coachella Merch Sales Records. Via his brand Skylrk, Bieber sold $5.04 million worth of product over weekend one of Coachella, beating the festival’s previous two-weekend record of $1.7 million across both weekends, the brand confirmed exclusively to *Vogue Business*. Bieber did have a leg up via an additional sales outlet: on top of the Skylrk-produced ‘Swag’ merch available alongside other artists’ merch in the artist merch tent, the brand also sold product at the Skylrk Shop, located next to its Skylrk Oasis, a respite space with shade and cool mist, which was open to all festival attendees. Producing merch under the Skylrk brand generated strong media impact value (MIV) for the brand, achieving $2.3 million to date in MIV, according to Launchmetrics. Bieber officially founded Skylrk less than a year ago, in July 2025, after the artist began teasing the clothing brand back in December 2023. Throughout 2024, Bieber and his wife Hailey Bieber wore the brand consistently, before Bieber officially debuted the Skylrk site in 2025.

recentArticles.title: Jessie Ware Sets Major International ‘Superbloom’ Tour - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Ahead of her new album release, Jessie Ware announces a trans-Atlantic tour that's said to be her biggest to date, and includes her first-ever U.K. arena run. The British pop artist’s trans-Atlantic tour is said to be her biggest to date, and includes her first-ever U.K. arena run. The *Superbloom Tour* gets underway in Toronto on Oct. 6, and includes stops in Toronto, New York’s Radio City Music Hall, Washington DC, Chicago, San Francisco and Los Angeles’ Greek Theatre, before heading to Mexico City’s Teatro Metropolitan. According to a statement, the new collection “erupts into a glittering rush of Studio 54-inflected groove-pop, exploring themes of pleasure, intimacy, connection and transformation,” and houses the previously-released singles “I Could Get Used To This,” “Ride,” and “Automatic.”. I’m not the most by-the-book ‘pop star’, but I do like to play with dress-up, glamor, and fun, While I love dance music, I wanted to dig deeper with this record; to connect with real relationships and appreciate the love I have, and the fears I have of losing it.”. Oct. 8 — Radio City Music Hall, New York, NY.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導英國歌手Jessie Ware宣布其新專輯和跨大西洋巡演，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars unlocks the ultimate feel good show at tour opener - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: Bruno Mars unlocks the ultimate feel good show at tour opener. # Bruno Mars unlocks the ultimate feel good show at tour opener. ## Bruno Mars has history in Las Vegas. That Mars kicked off the nearly 80-date worldwide outing – his first stadium tour and his return to the road after almost a decade – in Las Vegas is more than happenstance. A few hours before Mars hit the Allegiant Stadium stage for the first of two sold-out shows Friday, April 10, he was bestowed with an honor not even the Queen of Las Vegas, Celine Dion, can boast – the official naming of his own street (Bruno Mars Drive) near the home of that long-term residency. While .Paak is on the tour to present an opening set as DJ Pee .Wee, he also vaulted out to perform a quartet of Silk Sonic tunes with Mars, including the funk-hip-hop-hybrid “777” and “the song that started this whole thing,” Mars said, the bedroom seducer “Leave the Door Open.”. ## Why Bruno Mars is a musical unicorn.

recentArticles.title: Buju Banton Returns to VP Records, Shares New ‘Butterflies’ Single Ahead of U.S. Summer Tour - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Buju Banton Returns to VP Records, Shares New ‘Butterflies’ Single Ahead of U.S. Summer Tour. ### Buju Banton Mounts Dynamic U.S. Return with ‘Long Walk to Freedom’ New York Concerts: 5 Best Moments. “I have been working with VP Records for over 30 years, and I will say it again … they get it,” Banton, whose lengthy partnership with the storied indie Caribbean music label includes releases such as 2003’s *Friends for Life*, said in a statement. This summer, Banton will also join forces with nine-time Grammy-winning reggae superstar Stephen Marley for a joint Roots and Rhymes Tour. In 2025, he won the Caribbean Music Award for reggae collaboration of the year alongside Damian Marley and Bugle for “Thank You Lord.”. Buju Banton has sent 12 projects to the top 10 of Reggae Albums, with four of them also reaching the all-genre Billboard 200.
